title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Vegapunk, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't afford to dilly-dally, let's lift the defense system!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let the time he bought us go to waste!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't crack it. Don't forget, I'm a vega- punk too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Focus! Kizaru is made of light, he could be passing through the laser barrier any minute now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, what?! You mean he can get in whenever he wants?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That guy almost wiped us out back in the day, y'know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we need to do is carry the ship over to the back of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "No one should be able to get through the barrier...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My MT! The straw hat pirates... how nostalgic...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's book it! Once the barrier is down, we need to be ready to get out of here pronto!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those are the three things that can't become collateral....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, it would be nice if I could add "old friends" to that list. Unfortunately, though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy and the others are still making their way back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be pointless to lift the barrier if the ship isn't in position!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
